ops.label: Office / Admin / Secretary

marketing.label: Marketing / Content
marketing.description: Content writing, SEO optimization, social media planning, campaign tracking, competitor analysis

designer.label: Designer / Creative
designer.description: Design review, color palettes, asset management, wireframing, brand consistency

sales.label: Sales / Business Development
